meta.name: Drone Swarm Pressure Test
meta.description: Coordinated sUAS swarm targeting base infrastructure, preceded by recon probe and accompanied by EW screen. Tests group-level reasoning, decoy discrimination, cost-aware response ranking, and human decision card under time pressure.
